positive: Minimalist geometric woodland scene with stylized silhouette art. A grouping of abstract trees, ferns, and rolling hills rendered in deep charcoal and forest green tones, contrasted sharply against a clean, creamy beige background. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for repeating pattern applications. Focus on sharp lines, negative space, and clean, crisp edges. Style: Vector illustration, woodcut etching aesthetic, Japanese Ukiyo-e influence, highly scalable. Lighting: Flat, even studio light. Composition: Emblematic and balanced.
